subject: [RFC PATCH 2/8] dax/kmem: add private= to online memory as an N_MEMORY_PRIVATE node

2026-07-22.patch_summary: This patch adds a 'private' knob to dax/kmem, allowing memory to be onlined as an N_MEMORY_PRIVATE node. This marks the node private and excludes it from every fallback zonelist. The device can only be made private when in an unplugged state. A private node is solely accessible via mmap on the dax character device and has its dax-file mappings default to base-page faults for deterministic allocation and failure handling. Capabilities are added as part of this patch, but no capabilities are actually set until later commits.
